name: Airtasker Limited
analysis: ART's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 56% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.2100, stop A$0.2029, target A$0.2350 (3.55:1) — then trail it.
